---
title: "Extended Data — Cluster marker genes"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r setup_libraries_data}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)

BASE_SIZE <- 8
out_dir <- here::here("output_figures/paper/extended_figures/markers/")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

targets::tar_config_set(store = here::here("_targets"))
targets::tar_load(arc_diet_labeled)
targets::tar_load(arc_glp1rko_labeled)
```

## Diet dataset — top markers per cluster

```{r diet_markers, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
Idents(arc_diet_labeled) <- "seurat_clusters"
diet_marks <- FindAllMarkers(arc_diet_labeled, only.pos = TRUE, min.pct = 0.25, logfc.threshold = 0.5)

top5 <- diet_marks %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    slice_max(avg_log2FC, n = 3) %>%
    ungroup()

p_dot_diet <- DotPlot(arc_diet_labeled, features = unique(top5$gene),
                      group.by = "seurat_clusters", dot.scale = 4) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 5),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "diet_cluster_markers_dotplot.pdf"), plot = p_dot_diet, h = 8, w = 14)

write_csv(diet_marks, paste0(out_dir, "diet_all_markers.csv"))
write_csv(top5, paste0(out_dir, "diet_top3_markers.csv"))
```

## Diet dataset — canonical markers

```{r diet_canonical, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
canonical <- c("Agrp", "Npy", "Pomc", "Cartpt", "Glp1r", "Lepr", "Trh",
               "Tbx19", "Irx3", "Irx5", "Nr5a1", "Kiss1", "Ghrh", "Sst",
               "Nts", "Th", "Hdc", "Crh")

p_canon <- DotPlot(arc_diet_labeled, features = canonical,
                   group.by = "seurat_clusters", dot.scale = 5) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "diet_canonical_markers_dotplot.pdf"), plot = p_canon, h = 6, w = 10)
```

## KO dataset — canonical markers by predicted celltype

```{r ko_markers, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
p_ko_canon <- DotPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, features = canonical,
                      group.by = "predicted.celltype", dot.scale = 5) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "ko_canonical_markers_dotplot.pdf"), plot = p_ko_canon, h = 6, w = 10)
```

## Lepr expression across cell types — all datasets

```{r lepr_dotplots, fig.width=6, fig.height=4}
targets::tar_load(arc_lepip)

# Diet dataset
p_lepr_diet <- DotPlot(arc_diet_labeled, features = "Lepr",
                        group.by = "seurat_clusters", dot.scale = 8) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 6)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Diet dataset")

# Leptin IP dataset
p_lepr_lepip <- DotPlot(arc_lepip, features = "Lepr",
                         group.by = "predicted.celltype", dot.scale = 8) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 6)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Leptin IP dataset")

# KO dataset
p_lepr_ko <- DotPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, features = "Lepr",
                      group.by = "predicted.celltype", dot.scale = 8) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 6)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "GLP1R/Lepr-KO dataset")

p_lepr_all <- p_lepr_diet / p_lepr_lepip / p_lepr_ko +
    patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1))

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "lepr_expression_all_datasets.pdf"), plot = p_lepr_all, h = 10, w = 8)
```
